Developed Maharashtra 2047 will be in the service of the government under the ambitious plan of the state government.
Capacity building needs to take place beyond the last element. Accordingly, the post-wise duties under each department
It is necessary to determine the responsibilities and find out the training requirements required for those positions.
The officers / staff cadres under the Urban Development Department are as follows.
Officers of the Maharashtra Urban Administrative Service
Directorate of Municipal Administration Establishment Staff Cadre
Maharashtra Municipal Council State Service Cadre - Total 8 Cadres
4. Municipal Council Staff Cadre - Total 15 Cadres
1. Determine their duties and responsibilities for the above mentioned associations and their training requirements thereafter.
And to create the required training programs with the help of AI Tool i got the following:
The Capacity Building Committee is headed by the Hon'ble Additional Chief Secretary (NV-II), Urban Development Department.
is being formed.
Government Order No: MCO-2026 / No.160 / NO.14
4. The aforesaid Committee shall perform their duties and responsibilities for the communities under the Urban Development Department.
After determining their training needs and the required training program, i got the AI Tool.
The Department of General Administration as well as the Central Government have provided in this regard for the preparation of the assistance.
Nodal Officer Smt. Priyanka Chhapawale, Dy.
